Metadata.title: Yana Kazakova | Frontend Developer
Metadata.description: CV of Yana Kazakova, frontend developer. Next.js, React, TypeScript, modern web technologies.

entries.title: Senior Software Engineer
achievements: Designed frontend architecture and built client-side web apps using <React>, <Next.js>, and <TypeScript>
Optimized messenger performance by implementing virtual scrolling for long message lists, eliminating UI freezes and improving UX in chats with thousands of messages
Built an AI recruiting platform from scratch with <Next.js>, <SSR>, AI response streaming, and dynamic forms, achieving 98% error-free sessions and processing 500+ applications in the first months
Engineered a Gantt-like task management service with <ag-Grid> for large datasets and complex logic for grouping overlapping tasks into distinct rows

Maintained and enhanced 7+ services on <Vue 2>/<Vue 3> and <React>, implementing real-time updates via <WebSocket>, custom components (multi-range date picker, masked inputs), and tables with server-side pagination
Introduced unit testing (<Jest>) and error monitoring (<Sentry>) to ensure product stability
Acted as the sole frontend developer, taking full ownership of architecture, releases, and code quality

entries.title: Software Developer
achievements: Developed and maintained frontend applications on <Vue 2> and <React>: bug fixing and feature development
Improved UI consistency and application stability
Ensured uninterrupted service operation with 99.9% availability while continuously rolling out new functionality

entries.title: Frontend Developer
achievements: Created responsive, cross-browser interfaces from <Figma> mockups
Built reusable <React> components and configured client-side routing (<React Router>)
Optimized codebase by migrating class components to functional components with hooks

projects.title: Interactive CV
projects.description: A responsive personal website with an interactive work history section. Built with Next.js to showcase frontend development skills.
